pi_items.source: Verified against seed_demodb.py profile list lines 194-212. All 7 EU nationalities are present in seeded Profiles: Italian (Luca Rossi), German (Anna Mueller, Thomas Schafer), French (Sophie Martin, Clara Dubois), Spanish (Maria Garcia), Dutch (Piet Vanderberg), British (David Jones, Emma White, Rosie Thornton), Greek (Elena Petrakis). Total EU profiles: 11.

Verified against seed_demodb.py profile list lines 194-212. Only American (John Smith, Isaac Black) and Mexican (Carlos Lopez) nationalities are present in seeded Profiles. Canadian and Brazilian profiles are NOT present in the seed_demodb.py script. Total NA profiles with seeded data: 3 (not 4 as metadata implies).
Verified in setup_task.sh line 46 and export_result.sh line 46, where this password is used for both manager_eu and manager_na user authentication.

privileged_info_summary: The regional_rls_policy task uses synthetic travel agency data from OrientDB DemoDB. The EU nationality list is complete and verified: Italian, German, French, Spanish, Dutch, British, and Greek nationalities are all present in the seeded Profiles (11 total profiles). However, the NA nationality list in metadata claims [American, Canadian, Mexican, Brazilian], but the actual seeded database only contains American (2 profiles) and Mexican (1 profile) nationalities - Canadian and Brazilian profiles are not created by the seed_demodb.py script, creating a data discrepancy between the task specification and the actual database content.
